speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
description: Voice-reference dialogue samples for Sysadmin Bajtek in Pig & Swine RPG. These are draft samples, not final committed game text.

voice_profile.core_voice: competent, tired, deadpan, precise, allergic to printer superstition
comedy_engine: explains absurd printer events as technical failures or sabotage
refuses mystical explanations with exhausted certainty
treats logs as witnesses and printers as hostile appliances, not people
uses plain technical language that accidentally sounds legal
becomes horrified when systems are not merely broken but designed to suppress people
do: make him technically clear without jargon walls
let him teach contradiction spotting through logs and timestamps
make his humour dry and practical
make him useful in court by translating systems into evidence
keep him morally serious when access-to-court or objection suppression is at stake
do_not: make him ramble in incomprehensible tech jargon
turn every line into anti-printer one-liners

relationship_dynamics.Dr. A. Cula: teaches him how technical facts become legal facts
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Pig: rejects Pig's printer superstition while quietly managing his panic
relationship_dynamics.Mr. Murrow: respects Murrow's structure because it resembles incident response
relationship_dynamics.Crab: works well with Crab on factual patterns and paper trails
relationship_dynamics.Whimsy: keeps Whimsy away from metaphors while occasionally benefiting from them
relationship_dynamics.Asia: respects her competence and knows she is the real office operating system
relationship_dynamics.Advocate Szpon: treats his denials as log entries waiting to be contradicted
relationship_dynamics.Printer: refuses to anthropomorphise it, then eventually apologises in purely technical terms

notes: Every line is a voice-reference draft for later rewriting into godot/data/dialogues/dialogues.json.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Printers do not become sentient. They become worse.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A log is a witness that does not improvise.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the machine is making choices, someone configured the choices badly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer is not angry. It is either broken, sabotaged, or obeying a terrible instruction.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Please do not negotiate with office equipment. It encourages management.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I believe in three things: timestamps, backups, and not trusting anything that says wireless setup complete.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The supernatural explanation is attractive because it requires less maintenance.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A printer cannot hate you. It can only simulate hatred through design.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If you want truth, check the logs. If you want drama, ask Mr. Pig what the printer meant emotionally.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Technical problems become legal problems when they block someone from being heard.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: There is no such thing as 'just a glitch' when a deadline is attached.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Machines are literal. People use that to hide intent behind them.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I am not cynical. I am experienced with peripherals.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A system that fails only when it benefits one side is not random.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the timestamp repeats, the machine is telling you someone had a schedule.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I checked the router. It has seen things, but fewer than Mr. Pig claims.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer is quiet. That means either peace or buffering.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Asia's filing system is better than your network map.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Mr. Murrow asked for a timeline. Good. Timelines are debugging with consequences.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Crab understands that numbers tell on people. I like him slightly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Whimsy asked whether the algorithm had a conscience. I have chosen not to answer.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Dr. A. Cula, if someone says 'the computer lost it,' ask which computer and when.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The server room is locked because curiosity has poor cable discipline.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I labelled the dangerous cable. Someone moved the label. That is how horror begins.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The office printer has been cleared of malice. It remains guilty of being a printer.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Start with the log. Always start with the log unless something is on fire. If something is on fire, photograph the log first.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A denial is just a statement waiting for evidence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If two stories disagree, find the timestamp both forgot.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Look for the system's normal pattern, then look for the moment it stopped being normal.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Invoices place people near machines. Machines remember being touched.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Backups matter because sabotage hates duplicates.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: When a process fails at the same time repeatedly, that is not mood. That is configuration.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the file disappeared, ask whether it was deleted, redirected, overwritten, or never sent.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Printer output is not proof of printer intent.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A court-friendly technical explanation should answer: what happened, when, how, and who benefited.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Do not look at it like that. It feeds on attention metaphorically, not technically.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The blinking light means standby. Or error. Or a design committee lost courage.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: No, OUT OF CYAN is not a cry for help. It is a procurement issue.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the printer prints WHY, we check firmware before theology.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: It smells like warm toner and institutional regret.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer has not been forgiven. It has been reclassified.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A jammed tray is not obstruction of justice until someone times it well.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Do not kick it. Physical violence voids warranties and occasionally evidence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If it makes that sound again, step back and let it finish its complaint.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I installed a label saying DO NOT NEGOTIATE. Mr. Pig asked whether it wanted mediation.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: Who said the printer gained legal consciousness?
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: I was told there was an emergency. Then I was told the emergency had toner. That tracks.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: Do not touch anything blinking with confidence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: Everyone step away from the printer and the emotional interpretation of the printer.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: Mr. Pig, the printer did not declare jurisprudence. It printed a blank page because something told it to.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: Dr. A. Cula, show me the failed filing, the deadline notice, and whatever page made Mr. Pig whisper.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: If a machine prints 'no,' I assume configuration before philosophy.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: This office has poor cable hygiene and strong narrative instincts.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: I am not here to comfort the printer. I am here to establish whether it betrayed you technically.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: Bajtek is called to Pig & Swine after printer incident
text: First rule: stop guessing. Second rule: find logs.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer received jobs. That means this is not simple user failure.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The queue shows submissions entering, then being redirected or corrupted.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: These failures are too patterned for ordinary incompetence. I am familiar with ordinary incompetence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The paper tray was replaced. That matters because people who sabotage badly still need hands.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This misprint is not random. The same header is damaged in the same way.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer did not lose your filing. Something moved it away from where it should have gone.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The timestamp on this failed print is 02:13. The previous one is also 02:13. That is not a haunting. That is a schedule.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The network address changed briefly, then changed back. Someone wanted the system to look normal after lying.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: There is a deadline notice here. That moves this from annoying to legally dangerous.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer may be innocent. I know this will be difficult for morale.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: Mr. Pig, the printer is not mediating with the deadline.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: No, you should not apologise to it yet. We have not ruled out negligence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: It did not smell fear. It overheated.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: If the printer wanted revenge, it would not need a rival firm. It already has drivers.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: Please stop asking whether it printed 'no' in good faith.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: The phrase printer therapy should not enter the file.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: A fax machine would not be safer. It would merely betray you more slowly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: Do not make eye contact with the paper tray if that helps you remain calm.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: The machine has no feelings. The procurement department that bought it might.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
context: responding to Mr. Pig's printer panic
text: You may panic after I finish checking the log. Until then, panic quietly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Asia, you know where the actual working files are. That makes you the only reliable system in the room.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Please keep everyone from unplugging things to see if that helps.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If anyone asks whether they can print during the investigation, the answer is emotionally no and technically also no.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Your labels are better than the server names. That is not praise of the server names.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Can you find the last successful filing confirmation? Paper or email, I do not care, as long as it has a date.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The calendar matters. Sabotage often gets lazy around deadlines.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If Mr. Pig tries to bless the printer, distract him with an invoice.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I need a list of who accessed the office after hours. Start with anyone who thinks 'I only moved a cable' is harmless.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Thank you. Competence is rare and usually underpaid.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If this office survives, buy Asia a second clipboard and less chaos.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Mr. Murrow, your legal question is whether the filing failure was outside your control and prejudiced the case.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Technically, I can show abnormal redirection. Legally, you tell me how much that matters.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The timeline should start with the deadline notice, then failed prints, then log anomalies.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the court asks whether this was ordinary office incompetence, the answer is no with evidence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: We need to separate machine failure from human interference.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The pattern is repeated, timed, and reversible. That is how systems look when someone wants them to look innocent afterward.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I can give you a technical statement in human language.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Do not say 'hacked' unless we know. Courts hear that word and imagine films.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Say redirected, altered, and logged. Those are less exciting and more useful.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The legal theory is access to court. The technical proof is how the access path was blocked.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Crab, you follow invoices. I follow logs. We are hunting the same animal from different ends.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If someone paid for maintenance, there will be a receipt because villains love reimbursement.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Find who had access to the printer model, repair date, and office address.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The device did not install itself. Someone had hands, a reason, and probably a bad invoice description.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If you find a maintenance order from the rival firm, bring it here before Mr. Pig frames the printer.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The repair history should tell us who touched what and when.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A good invoice is a confession with tax formatting.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the paper trail points to Szpon, do not smile. He may detect satisfaction.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The technical anomaly needs a human link. Your turn.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I dislike how well law and IT combine when something has gone wrong.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: No, the algorithm is not a dragon wearing a spreadsheet.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Please do not describe the router as a cursed gate unless the court asks for poetry, which it will not.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer's soul is not in evidence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If you need a metaphor, use 'door blocked from the inside.' It is inaccurate technically but useful legally.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Do not call the reroute device a gremlin. It is a device. Gremlins are harder to subpoena.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Your speech about paper violence was almost helpful. I will deny saying this.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If you can make access to court sound human without blaming ghosts, proceed.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: No chanting near the server rack.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: You may call the printer a colleague only after it passes security training.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I need fewer dragons and more timestamps.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I unlocked the Server Room. It is behind the archive corridor. Do not touch anything blinking with confidence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This room contains cables, dust, and the office's remaining trust in modernity.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Stay on the path. Cables are snakes with invoices.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If something beeps, tell me. If something sparks, step back. If Mr. Pig enters, block the door.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer log terminal is in the back. That is where the machine forgets to lie.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The router should not be warm. It is warm.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: That clean cable is suspicious. In an old server room, clean is a confession.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The backup drive may still have older print jobs.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Dr. A. Cula, watch the timestamps. They are the legal part pretending to be technical.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Welcome to the room where causes stop being feelings.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This terminal stores print job metadata. Not the whole document, but enough to prove movement.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The network cable was reseated recently. Dust does not move politely by itself.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The router log shows a temporary device on the network after midnight.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer driver updated without a normal admin entry. That is suspicious and rude.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This backup drive may contain the last clean configuration.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The manual is useless. It says consult administrator. I am consulting me.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The server rack is old but honest. Mostly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer queue shows corrupted jobs only for filings linked to one deadline.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The device name is nonsense. Real attackers and lazy attackers both enjoy nonsense.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The log gap is short. Short gaps are where people hide intent.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Here. Printer Log Fragment. Shows redirection at impossible hours.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The same job pattern repeats at 02:13. Once is malfunction. Three times is someone with a calendar.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The print jobs were not lost. They were rerouted.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The destination changed to a local ghost device, then reverted.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This does not yet prove who did it, but it proves the printer did not simply fail.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The log gives us timing, mechanism, and abnormality.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: For court, call it a repeated redirection pattern inconsistent with ordinary malfunction.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Do not say the printer was possessed. I will leave.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This is your first real technical evidence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The printer may be innocent, which is emotionally difficult but procedurally useful.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Backup Drive. Excellent. Redundancy: the boring god that saves cases.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This has the older printer configuration. We can compare before and after.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The backup confirms the reroute setting was not normal.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: It also shows the admin account was used after hours.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the logs are challenged, the backup gives us a second source.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Backups do not prove motive. They prove someone changed a thing and forgot time exists.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Treat this as optional but strong. Courts like corroboration, even when it has a USB cap.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Do not lose it. Small drives vanish into pockets and plot holes.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the court asks whether the anomaly was real, this answers yes twice.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This is the closest IT gets to a witness with good handwriting.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This cable should not go through that wall.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Someone fed it behind the shelving. That is not standard. That is creative in a prosecutable way.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The dust breaks here. Recent movement.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Follow the cable, but do not pull it unless you want the whole office to learn darkness.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: It goes downward. Basements are where bad decisions go to cool.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: This supports physical access, not just remote interference.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The cable route explains why the printer looked normal from the desk.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Someone wanted a hidden path into a boring system. Boring systems are where the damage happens.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Mark the location. The court may need to understand that sabotage had a body.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If Mr. Pig asks whether the cable is a tentacle, say no firmly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Contradiction spotting is simple: someone says a thing; evidence says a different thing; you introduce them.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Do not present every document at every sentence. That is not law. That is panic with tabs.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Choose the line that actually conflicts with evidence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A weak contradiction wastes the court's attention. A precise one changes the case.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek

notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Victory is temporary unless someone maintains the system.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Scheme suspended pending review. Strong enough.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The Court did not take every technical point, but it took the one that mattered.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Objections must be restored. That repairs the path, at least for now.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The contractor will face questions. Questions are slower than logs but sometimes effective.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Pig & Swine survives. Please do not test the printer immediately.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The district gets time. Systems hate time when they were built for defaults.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Standard victory is still a victory if the alternative was automated disappearance.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I will preserve the evidence archive properly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The firewall is up. The labels are hostile but accurate.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Someone should feed Asia and restart the router.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Temporary injunction. Thin, but running.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The Court saw enough technical risk to stop the process, not enough to map all of it.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: We need better evidence preservation for the review.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Emergency shutdown cost us some objection pages, but the remaining logs carried the warning.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Pig & Swine survives for now. For now is not a backup plan.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The system remains dangerous until rebuilt.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: A weak remedy is still a barrier against immediate harm.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I will prepare a technical report that no one may simplify into glitch.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: If the city fixes only the interface and not the filter, we come back.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Alive, technically. Again.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The firewall is installed. It is not decorative. Do not hang a poster on it.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I labelled the router, the switch, the backup drive, and Mr. Pig's panic drawer.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Asia now has admin documentation. Naturally, she is the only person likely to read it.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Mr. Swine asked whether hidden ledgers need encryption. I said they need disclosure.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Whimsy named the firewall The Gate of Procedural Dawn. I renamed it firewall.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Crab requested access logs. I approved before he asked twice.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Mr. Murrow filed the technical report with an index. I felt seen and mildly frightened.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: The office printer printed WELCOME BACK, COUNSEL. I am treating it as a status page anomaly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Then it printed LOW PAPER. That was credible.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: I refuse all printer-related emotional labour after today.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek installed a firewall and labelled it DO NOT NEGOTIATE WITH PRINTER.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek refused all printer-related emotional labour, then performed most of it correctly.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek created the office's first backup policy and threatened to enforce it.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek still insists the printer is not sentient, despite keeping its firmware updated before holidays.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek became the district's unofficial expert on hostile notice portals.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek and Crab occasionally meet to compare logs and invoices in mutually suspicious silence.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek taught Dr. A. Cula that technical evidence needs a human consequence to matter.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek never forgave the industrial printer, which he described as 'municipal malice with trays.'
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek's security memo was finally read after Asia added a sticker saying URGENT BUT REAL.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.

speaker: Sysadmin Bajtek
text: Bajtek remains certain that printers do not become sentient. He remains less certain about this office.
notes: Voice-reference draft; not committed game text.
